response.overview: The 2026 Rebellion is an upcoming professional wrestling pay-per-view (PPV) event produced by Total Nonstop Action Wrestling (TNA). It will take place on April 11, 2026, at the Wolstein Center in Cleveland, Ohio. It will be the eighth event under the Rebellion chronology and will feature wrestlers from WWE's NXT brand due to the ongoing partnership between the two promotions.
response.title: TNA Rebellion 2026
